case_title: JACKSON, AARON VS DESOUSA, GEOFFREY W.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY JACKSON, AARON AS TO DEFENDANT DESOUSA, GEOFFREY W. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-16-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-16-1997, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-21-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR JACKSON, AARON ASSIGNED TO THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC. A CORPORATION
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DESOUSA, GEOFFREY W.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DESOUSA, GEOFFREY W.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $5,397.47 AS TO DEFENDANT DESOUSA, GEOFFREY W.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JACKSON, AARON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DESOUSA, GEOFFREY W. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,040.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT DESOUSA, GEOFFREY W.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $96.61 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT DESOUSA, GEOFFREY W.
